description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-textarea` (T1-06). 6/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-textarea/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, ElementInternals form association, auto-resize implementation typing
2. Accessibility — label association, `aria-describedby` for help/error, `aria-invalid`, `aria-required`, character count announced to screen readers if present, axe-core pass
3. Tests — form association, auto-resize behavior, min/max rows, character count, disabled/readonly, error/help text
4. Storybook — all variants, auto-resize demo, character count demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, resize handle visible/hidden variants, CSS parts (textarea, label, helper, counter)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-textarea/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-textarea — T1-06 antagonistic quality review
